name: Tin
appearance: A soft, pliable metal; below 13°C it slowly changes to a powder form.
relevance: Sn 是 SnSe2、SnSe、SnS2、SnS、SnSeS 的共同阳离子元素。
常见氧化态为 +2 和 +4，因此可形成 Sn(II) 与 Sn(IV) 硫/硒化物。

source.name: Royal Society of Chemistry Periodic Table
source.evidence: RSC fact box lists atomic number 50, relative atomic mass 118.710, group 14, melting point 231.928°C, boiling point 2586°C, density 7.287 g cm−3, and common oxidation states 4, 2.

name: Selenium
appearance: A semi-metal that can exist as a silvery metal or as a red powder.
relevance: Se 是 SnSe2、SnSe、SnSeS 的阴离子元素。
Se 与 S 同属 16 族，替换或合金化会影响能隙、价带位置和晶格。

source.name: Royal Society of Chemistry Periodic Table
source.evidence: RSC fact box lists atomic number 34, relative atomic mass 78.971, group 16, melting point 220.8°C, boiling point 685°C, density 4.809 g cm−3, and common oxidation states 6, 4, -2.

name: Sulfur
appearance: The most common allotrope appears as yellow crystals or powder.
relevance: S 是 SnS2、SnS、SnSeS 的阴离子元素。
S 与 Se 同属 16 族，Sn-Se-S 合金中 S/Se 比例是判断材料的重要线索。

source.name: Royal Society of Chemistry Periodic Table
source.evidence: RSC fact box lists atomic number 16, relative atomic mass 32.06, group 16, melting point 115.21°C, boiling point 444.61°C, density 2.07 g cm−3, and common oxidation states 6, 4, 2, -2.
